= tracing_span


Returns the OpenTelemetry tracing span attached to the message as a text map object, or &#x60;null&#x60; if no span exists. Use this to propagate trace context to downstream systems via headers or metadata.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.headers.traceparent = tracing_span().traceparent

# In:  {"some_stuff":"just can't be explained by science"}
# Out: {"headers":{"traceparent":"00-4bf92f3577b34da6a3ce929d0e0e4736-00f067aa0ba902b7-01"}}
----

[,bloblang]
----
# Forward all tracing fields to output metadata.

meta = tracing_span()
----
